messages.body: Hey Lav,   We've initiated your refund and would love to set up a meeting with Paul to discuss further. Please let me know your availability.
Hi Lav, Just checking in — we’d like to discuss a few optimization opportunities that could positively impact your lead flow. Could you please share a suitable time for a quick call this week?

Subject: Schedule a call back for a meet - Zoca\n\nBody: Hi, I hope you’re doing well. We’ve been trying to connect with you for some time now, and it would be great if you could please let us know a convenient time for …
